title: SooperDooperScooper
description: Take the brains and put them somewhere else
body:
## _Ya know that intrusive thought that begins, "If I just pushed this Q-Tip really hard..."?*_

Okay so this is that...but for Minecraft mobs. Just grab yourself a "nobrains" nametag to do a lil brain scoopin' to get a mob with an empty noggin.

And if you want to put them back, you can just use a "givebrains" nametag. Easier than making one of those single-serving microwave Kraft Mac & Cheese bowls--you don't even have to add water here!

The primary goal of this plugin is to cut down on the AI load of villagers and piglins on large SMPs where a lot of people have trading/bartering set ups.

To that end, you might be wondering how trading/bartering still occurs. Well listen up because I'm gonna learn ya some knowledge:

Piglins will function like normal. Honestly, you may not see any significant improvements here unless your server has a lot of persistent piggies. However, you can choose to let Piglins be NoAI-ed outside of the nether, which will prevent them from zombifying. If you do that, you can also control if they can barter outside of the nether when NoAI-ed, or if they'd only be a nice set decoration.

Villagers will continue to restock twice per day by default. You can increase this if you wish. (Could make a nice incentive for people to have their villagers pushed to the left end of the IQ bell curve)

Villagers can also have their restocking hours constrained. By default, they'll restock every 20/n minutes (where n is the number of daily restocks you configure). But there are two other modes to choose from
- "Daytime hours only" will make it so they restock every 10/n minutes, but only from 6am to 6pm.
- "Working hours only" will make it so they restock every 5.83/n minutes, but only from 8am to 3pm.

Permissions:
- sds - Gives player access to all functionality
  - sds.noBrains - Allow player to lobotomize any mob
  - sds.giveBrains - Allow player to un-lobotomize any mob
  - sds.villager - Allow player to lobotomize/un-lobotomize villagers
    - sds.villager.noBrains - Allow player to lobotomize villagers
    - sds.villager.giveBrains - Allow player to un-lobotomize villagers​
  - sds.piglin - Allow player to lobotomize/un-lobotomize piglins
    - sds.piglin.noBrains - Allow player to lobotomize piglins
    - sds.piglin.giveBrains - Allow player to un-lobotomize piglins

​
*_Please do not push Q-Tips deep into your ears. They're technically not even supposed to be used in your ears. Betcha didn't know that, did ya? Just out here serving up fact after fact. You're welcome._
